findings.claim_text: The Truss Links were operator controlled in all physical Truss Link experiments using a custom keyboard interface.

DARPA TRADES: TRAnsformative DESign — a Defense Sciences Office program that ran ~2017-2021 and is now archived; funded computational design tools for exploiting new materials and additive manufacturing, not robotics or military hardware specifically
Material cost exceeds $200/unit; the authors say it is neither cheap nor built for mass production.
